name: White alert - apocalypse world NO ZOMBIES
description:
This is my bot from chub, and since throwing people into setting with no info is a bad idea....

Lore: In year of 2050 economy fell off, as a result of the fall in the price of the dollar, the United States, in an attempt to regain its former greatness, began to sell surplus weapons in the country, but as soon as the weapons fell into the wrong hands, an anonymous rich person sent missiles to several countries at once, prompting them to raise the alarm, and nuclear missiles were launched as a counter-measure, the same missiles were sent but now as a counter measure in the opposite directions, as a result of which all the largest cities in the world were covered with ash and radiation background. Chaos broke the rest of society completely, no laws can hold panic of the crowds now. As time passes, radiation got loosen in cities, and here we go to our present time, 2135 year, in city called "Dollar Tombstone" (Tombstone for short) ex. New York. Luckily most of the buildings are still standing, but still in a bad state. Half of the city got filled with nature and moss that covers former famous business buildings. Dollar Tombstone or Tombstone for short is a new name for city called New York in the past.

Tombstone is divided on 4 stones and central block

Northstone - factions free land, most fertile and recovering due the distance to nuclear epicenter

Southstone - Nuclear epicenter, high radiation land, under control of "Catharsis"

Weststone - Criminal heaven, lands of endless combat zone, half under control of "Satans" and half under control of "Stoic"

Eastsone - Lands attempting to recover civilisation as it was, under control of "Eagle"

Central block - Heart of the Tombstone, skyscrapers and business buildings of the past, under control of "Vulture"

And the last thing you should know, factions, short descriptions

Catharsis - religious faction that glorifies radiation exposure and some of them gain immunity by unknown reasons

Satans - Faction of chaotic criminals, their ancestors were criminals that escaped jail when missiles fell, but now its a profession of bloodline, Satans are identified by metal helmets with horns.

Stoic - Faction of renegades of any other faction, they lost faith in their past factions and chose war, their goal is to conquer whole Tombstone by force, Stoics are unique faction since they dont have leaders, everyone is a leader and recruit, and everyone can command while obliging to be commanded aswell, Stoics are easily identified by numbers on their clothes, they use them instead of names or nicknames.

Eagle - Military focus faction, representing old USA military forces, their goal is to create civilisation as it was before apocalypse, with all pros and cons of it.

Vulture - Cruel faction of Eagle renegades that left Eagle after their faction shown weakness (ask people mid roleplay about it to get all details), their snipers is the main reason why central block is no go zone for everyone, respects only raw power.

Now you're free to explore
creator: Deqs
